summary: Iteration 27: Verified footer 4-column structure, dynamic page duplicate resolution, Layout 1 rendering with hero slides. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.js uses shared FooterContent component across all 3 themes - good DRY pattern
DynamicPage.js correctly handles duplicate pages by preferring those with layout field set
LayoutAboutBio.js properly uses useSettings() for social links (fixed in iteration 26)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 27 features verified working. Footer has 4-column structure (Logo+desc | Site Map | Resources | Connect) consistent across all themes via shared FooterContent component. Events page (/events_hospitality_group) correctly shows hero slides and Layout 1 (About/Bio) with image. DynamicPage.js handles duplicate pages by preferring those with layout field. Active theme is 'default'. Admin login works via API.

footer_4_column_structure.column_1_logo_desc: PASS - Logo image + footer_description from settings
footer_4_column_structure.column_2_site_map: PASS - Home, News, Gallery, Reading List (baseLinks)
footer_4_column_structure.column_3_resources: PASS - All footer pages from CMS (14 pages)
footer_4_column_structure.column_4_connect: PASS - 5 social icons + email input + subscribe button
footer_4_column_structure.consistent_across_themes: PASS - FooterContent shared component used by all 3 themes

dynamic_page_hero_slides.hero_slides_filter_by_page: PASS - API returns 1 slide for events page ID
